TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pakacidal == Caay pisakapolongan ko 'Amis a misacidal. Nawhani, o nipafelian no Kawas to kasasiroma no romi'ad to sakanga'ay no 'orip no mita o tamdaw. Saka, caay ka nga'ay a paterep to tayal no Kawas ko tamdaw. saka, caay pisakapolongan ko finawlan a mipakacidal, edeng o kasaopo no maponengay ato masipolo'ay a tamdaw ko mamidemak, mitatoy cangra to nisawadan a matelangay to a eli', likaten a misataliyoliyok to loma' no kasaopoan nangra.
S.PHON: == pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ == ʦaaj pisakapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u ʡamis a misaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. nawħani, o~u nipafəɾian no~u kawas to~u kasasiro~uma no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u ʡo~urip no~u mita o~u tamɬ~ɮaw. saka, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj a patərəp to~u tajaɾ no~u kawas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. saka, ʦaaj pisakapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u finawɾan a mipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, əɬ~ɮəŋ o~u kasao~upo~u no~u mapo~unəŋaj ato~u masipo~uɾo~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamiɬ~ɮəmak, mitato~uj ʦaŋra to~u nisawaɬ~ɮan a matəɾaŋaj to~u a əɾiʡ, ɾikatən a misataɾijo~uɾijo~uk to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u kasao~upo~uan naŋra.
S.FORM: == Pakacidal == Caay pisakapolongan ko 'Amis a misacidal. Nawhani, o nipafelian no Kawas to kasasiroma no romi'ad to sakanga'ay no 'orip no mita o tamdaw. Saka, caay ka nga'ay a paterep to tayal no Kawas ko tamdaw. saka, caay pisakapolongan ko finawlan a mipakacidal, edeng o kasaopo no maponengay ato masipolo'ay a tamdaw ko mamidemak, mitatoy cangra to nisawadan a matelangay to a eli', likaten a misataliyoliyok to loma' no kasaopoan nangra.
S.PHON: == pakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ == ʦaaj pisakapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u ʡamis a misaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. nawħani, o~u nipafəɾian no~u kawas to~u kasasiro~uma no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u ʡo~urip no~u mita o~u tamɬ~ɮaw. saka, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj a patərəp to~u tajaɾ no~u kawas ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. saka, ʦaaj pisakapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u finawɾan a mipakaʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, əɬ~ɮəŋ o~u kasao~upo~u no~u mapo~unəŋaj ato~u masipo~uɾo~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamiɬ~ɮəmak, mitato~uj ʦaŋra to~u nisawaɬ~ɮan a matəɾaŋaj to~u a əɾiʡ, ɾikatən a misataɾijo~uɾijo~uk to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u kasao~upo~uan naŋra.
